mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.writer_email AS writerEmail, p.title, p.duration_days AS durationDays, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.is_shared AS isShared, COALESCE(pp.day_no, 1) AS dayNo, pp.attraction_content_id AS attractionContentId, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, COALESCE(ct.content_type_name, '') AS contentTypeName, COALESCE(a.title, pp.place_name) AS placeName, a.addr1 AS address, a.first_image1 AS imageUrl, a.first_image1 AS firstimage, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.latitude AS mapy, a.longitude AS mapx FROM travel_plans p LEFT JOIN travel_plan_places pp ON p.id = pp.plan_id LEFT JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = pp.attraction_content_id LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id WHERE p.writer_email = #{writerEmail} ORDER BY p.id DESC, pp.day_no ASC, pp.place_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.writer_email AS writerEmail, p.title, p.duration_days AS durationDays, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.is_shared AS isShared, COALESCE(pp.day_no, 1) AS dayNo, pp.attraction_content_id AS attractionContentId, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, COALESCE(ct.content_type_name, '') AS contentTypeName, COALESCE(a.title, pp.place_name) AS placeName, a.addr1 AS address, a.first_image1 AS imageUrl, a.first_image1 AS firstimage, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.latitude AS mapy, a.longitude AS mapx FROM travel_plans p LEFT JOIN travel_plan_places pp ON p.id = pp.plan_id LEFT JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = pp.attraction_content_id LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id WHERE p.id = #{id} ORDER BY pp.day_no ASC, pp.place_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.writer_email AS writerEmail, p.title, p.duration_days AS durationDays, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.is_shared AS isShared, COALESCE(pp.day_no, 1) AS dayNo, pp.attraction_content_id AS attractionContentId, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, COALESCE(ct.content_type_name, '') AS contentTypeName, COALESCE(a.title, pp.place_name) AS placeName, a.addr1 AS address, a.first_image1 AS imageUrl, a.first_image1 AS firstimage, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.latitude AS mapy, a.longitude AS mapx FROM travel_plans p LEFT JOIN travel_plan_places pp ON p.id = pp.plan_id LEFT JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = pp.attraction_content_id LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_shared = TRUE ORDER BY pp.day_no ASC, pp.place_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_plans (id, writer_email, title, duration_days, created_at, is_shared) VALUES (#{id}, #{writerEmail}, #{title}, #{durationDays}, #{createdAt}, #{isShared})
INSERT INTO travel_plan_places (plan_id, day_no, place_order, place_name, attraction_content_id) VALUES (#{planId}, #{dayNo}, #{placeOrder}, #{placeName}, #{attractionContentId})
